name: German Apple Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Vanilla or grated rind of 1 Orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg with an electric mixer until light and lemon-colored.
2. Gradually beat in sugar until the mixture is thick and pale (this beating is very important to prevent sugariness).
3. Mix flour, baking powder, salt, and gently fold into the egg mixture.
4. Stir in apples, walnuts, and vanilla.
5. Generously butter an 8-inch square pan, pour in the batter.
6. Bake in a 350°F oven for 35-40 minutes or until the top is golden brown and crunchy.
7. Serve warm. Serves 6.
Origin: Found in old recipe box bought at garage sale. Shared by: Sharon Stevens
